title: parapolystichum grayi
intro: Parapolystichum grayi, also known as the Gray's polystichum, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Parapolystichum grayi include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Parapolystichum grayi can be prepared for medicinal use through decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically.
